title: EEG: RL Task (3-Armed Bandit) with alcohol cues in hazardous drinkers and ctls
description: This dataset comprises electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from 53 community participants performing a 3-armed bandit reinforcement learning task with alcohol and beverage cues. The study investigates electrophysiological markers of cue-specific exploration and decision-making processes in hazardous drinkers compared to controls. Data were collected between 2019-2021 at the University of New Mexico's Clinical Research Center Laboratory.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during a 3-armed bandit reinforcement learning task incorporating alcohol versus beverage cues. The dataset represents derivative data processed using the NEMAR-pipeline, a validated EEG preprocessing pipeline (version bcb79cb).
